customAttributes.description:
Draw X cards. If X is 10 or more, instead shuffle your graveyard into your library, draw X cards, untap up to five lands, and you have no maximum hand size for the rest of the game.
Exile Finale of Revelation.
customAttributes.detailNote: This product is a Presale item with an estimated shipping date of 11/15/2024. Please keep in mind card details, including rarity and card name, may change up until release date as information is updated.
customAttributes.flavorText: "Brother, your fate has always been bound to mine. Now we have reached the place where they shall both end."
